title_cn: 就业数据助长美联储加息押注，金价三周来最大跌幅
summary: Gold fell the most in three weeks as robust US jobs data fueled bets that the Federal Reserve will likely raise interest rates this year, a headwind for the precious metal.

title: GoldenTree's Tananbaum Spots a Credit-Equity Disconnect
title_cn: GoldenTree 的 Tananbaum 发现信贷与股权脱节
summary:
Credit market veteran Steven Tananbaum, founder of GoldenTree Asset Management says that opportunities are emerging in sectors facing fundamental business-model challenges, including software and cable, with some of the most compelling situations arising from mismatches between debt and equity valuations. He spoke with Bloomberg TV's Lisa Abramowicz at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York on June 3.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Titans Warn of Shakeout on Debt Deals That ‘Don’t Make Sense’
title_cn: 信贷巨头警告称，“没有意义”的债务交易将面临洗牌
summary: Davidson Kempner's Suzanne Gibbons, Glendon Capital's Holly Kim, Sculptor Capital's Brett Klein and Matthew Rahmani of Perella Weinberg speak with Bloomberg News' Irene Garcia Perez on how credit markets are navigating heightened volatility, higher-for-longer interest rates and the credit market's ``cockroach'' problem at Bloomberg's Global Credit Forum in New York on June 3. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Prosecutors are Scrutinizing Marks in Private Credit, Clayton Says
title_cn: 克莱顿表示，美国检察官正在审查私人信贷中的标记
summary: ends around 18:20 A discussion with US Attorney and former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton (Interviewed by Sridhar Natarajan) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TAG Immobilien Is Said to Eye Polish IPO Kickoff in Coming Weeks
title_cn: TAG Immobilien 预计将在未来几周内启动波兰 IPO
summary: German real estate group TAG Immobilien AG is considering starting the formal process for a potential initial public offering of its Polish unit Robyg SA in Warsaw as soon as the coming weeks, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Morgan Stanley Sees AI-Related Funding Expanding to 15% of All Credit Deals
title_cn: 摩根士丹利预计人工智能相关融资将扩大至所有信贷交易的 15%
summary: Scott Goodwin, co-founder and managing partner at Diameter Capital Partners, says that business development companies will face pressure to sell their highest-quality loans to software companies at a discount as banks tighten their grip on the private credit funds. Goodwin speaks with Bloomberg TV's Dani Burger at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York on June 3. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Calls on Spain to Cut Gas Use for Stability Post-Blackout
title_cn: 欧盟呼吁西班牙减少天然气使用以维持停电后的稳定
summary: The European Commission has called on Spain to move away from using gas-fired power plants to stabilize its electricity system after last year’s blackout, saying better grids, interconnections and more storage should replace the emergency measures.

title: Stocks and Bonds Fall as Jobs Fuel Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于就业推动美联储加息押注，股票和债券下跌：市场结束
summary: Wall Street’s historic weekly run is poised to come to a halt, with stocks and bonds falling after a solid jobs report added to speculation the Federal Reserve’s next interest-rate move will be a hike.

title: Senegal Makes Foreign-Currency Bond Payments Before IMF Visit
title_cn: 塞内加尔在国际货币基金组织访问之前支付外币债券
summary: Senegal made payments to bondholders ahead of schedule on two of its foreign-currency notes as the West African nation prepares to host the International Monetary Fund for talks on a new program later this month, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Bonds Slide as Hot Jobs Data Fuels Bets on 2026 Fed Hike
title_cn: 热门就业数据引发对 2026 年美联储加息的押注，美国债券下滑
summary: Bond traders fully priced in a Federal Reserve interest-rate hike by the end of this year after US job growth topped all forecasts in May, spurring yields higher in the $31 trillion Treasuries market.

title: Fannie, Freddie Whipsaw as Trump Floats Trillion-Dollar Value
title_cn: 特朗普浮现数万亿美元价值，房利美和房地美惨遭鞭打
summary: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac common shares rose sharply at the open on Friday after President Donald Trump said the two mortgage finance giants were probably worth $1 trillion, though they subsequently erased much of those gains as skepticism mounted.

title: Nuclear Watchdog Eyes Stronger Reactor Defenses After UAE Attack
title_cn: 阿联酋袭击后，核监管机构着眼于加强反应堆防御
summary: Iran’s attack last month on a nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates has prompted the world’s atomic watchdog to look at whether reactors’ external power supply lines need additional protection against the threat of war.

title: Oil Falls as Traders Weigh Demand Destruction, Stalled Talks
title_cn: 交易商担心需求遭到破坏，谈判陷入僵局，油价下跌
summary: Oil edged lower as traders assessed the extent of demand destruction against a backdrop of ongoing US-Iran peace talks, which have so far yielded little progress toward reopening the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Perú elige entre Fujimori y Sánchez en una votación decisiva
title_cn: 秘鲁在决定性投票中在藤森和桑切斯之间做出选择
summary: Perú elige presidente este domingo en una votación marcada por la polarización. Keiko Fujimori y Roberto Sánchez representan dos visiones opuestas sobre la economía, la seguridad y el futuro del país. ¿Qué está en juego? Te lo explicamos. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的热点话题
summary: Confira os assuntos que foram destaque da semana no Brasil com Patricia Xavier. Produção de Barbara Nascimento e Raphael Almeida.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P 500’s Record Streak in Danger as Technology Stocks Plunge
title_cn: 随着科技股暴跌，标准普尔 500 指数的创纪录纪录面临危险
summary: A record weekly run for US stocks was in danger on Friday, as a rotation out of technology stocks weighed on indexes and traders priced in an interest-rate hike following stronger-than-expected employment data.

title: Rieder Likens US Economy to 'Three-Month-Old Birthday Cake'
title_cn: 里德将美国经济比作“三个月大的生日蛋糕”
summary: BlackRock Global Fixed Income CIO Rick Rieder says the US economy is tricky right now, comparing it to a three-month-old birthday cake where the icing tastes great but underneath isn't so good. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Rieder says AI will change the ecosystem and the Federal Reserve should pull back a bit to evaluate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OPEC Output Plunges Further as US Squeezes Iran, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示，随着美国挤压伊朗，欧佩克产量进一步下降
summary: OPEC crude output fell last month, hitting its lowest level in decades as the US blockade of Iran and disruption in the Persian Gulf continued to curb production.

title: Rout Descends on Stock Market Where Positioning Lacks Extremes
title_cn: 股市溃败，仓位缺乏极端
summary: Investors have a lot of reasons to be worried after the stock market’s relentless rally since late March. To Goldman Sachs Group Inc. traders, extreme crowding isn’t high on the list.

title: Indian Households Expect Inflation to Spike, Confidence Wanes
title_cn: 印度家庭预计通胀将飙升，信心减弱
summary: Indian households expect inflation to accelerate through the year, Reserve Bank of India surveys showed, highlighting concerns over the US-Iran war and below-normal monsoon predictions.

title: Emerging-Market Currencies Sink on Gangbuster US Jobs Report
title_cn: 美国就业报告强劲导致新兴市场货币下跌
summary: Currencies in the developing world sank after a blowout US jobs report provided the clearest sign yet that the labor market is breaking out of a prolonged period of lackluster hiring, undercutting the case for rate cuts from the Federal Reserve.

title: India’s Economy Faces Threats That Currency Band-Aid Can’t Fix
title_cn: 印度经济面临货币创可贴无法解决的威胁
summary: India’s government and central bank took coordinated steps on Friday to spur foreign inflows, providing an immediate boost to the beleaguered currency. The challenge for policymakers will now be to sustain those flows in the face of economic threats beyond their control.

title: China, HK Investors Banned From SpaceX IPO Over Security
title_cn: 因安全问题中国和香港投资者被禁止参与 SpaceX IPO
summary: Underwriters on SpaceX’s $75 billion initial public offering have been told not to accept orders from investors in Hong Kong and China, citing US restrictions around the export of critical technology, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Wamco to Pay $100 Million in SEC Settlement Over Leech Trades
title_cn: Wamco 将就水蛭交易向 SEC 支付 1 亿美元和解金
summary: Western Asset Management Co. reached a $100 million settlement with the Securities and Exchange Commission to resolve an investigation related to trading practices of its onetime star manager Ken Leech.

title: Fed Is In No Hurry To Raise Rates, BlackRock's Rosenberg Says
title_cn: 贝莱德罗森伯格表示，美联储并不急于加息
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, BlackRock portfolio manager of the Systematic Multi-Strategy Fund, says after the May payrolls report, they're on the precipice of pricing in a full rate hike for this year. But he says policymakers are in no hurry to raise rates. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inflation Doesn’t Need a Big Response, Economist Roth Says
title_cn: 经济学家罗斯表示，通胀不需要大的反应
summary: Stephanie Roth, chief economist at Wolfe Research, says, “it doesn’t seem like inflation is accelerating in a material way,” as she examines the US May jobs report and what it means for Federal Reserve policy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Turns Upbeat on Tesla After Replacing Bearish Analyst
title_cn: 摩根大通在取代看跌分析师后转而看好特斯拉
summary: After swapping out its lead autos analyst, JPMorgan Chase & Co. is decidedly less bearish on Tesla Inc.

title: Here Are the Key Takeaways From the US Jobs Report for May
title_cn: 以下是美国 5 月份就业报告的主要内容
summary: Here are the key takeaways from the US employment report for May, released Friday:

title: Stocks Winning Streak to Break as Investors Weigh AI Prospects & Jobs Data | The Pulse 6/5/2026
title_cn: 随着投资者权衡人工智能前景和就业数据，股市连续上涨势头将被打破脉搏 2026 年 6 月 5 日
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Nannette Hechler-Fayd’Herbe, Lombard Odier, EMEA CIO; Mohamed Farid Saleh, Egyptian Investment and Foreign Trade Minister; Roxane Farmanfarmaian, University of Cambridge Professor (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Minnis Says AI Boom Is ‘Fundamental, Generational’ Force Driving Markets and Economy
title_cn: 高盛的明尼斯表示，人工智能的繁荣是推动市场和经济的“根本性、代际性”力量
summary: The boom in artificial intelligence investment is a “fundamental, generational” phenomenon driving markets and filtering through to the economy at large, Christina Minnis, global head of the alternatives origination group at Goldman Sachs, says in an interview with Bloomberg News' Davide Scigliuzzo at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York on June 3. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Banker Says to `Prepare for War' as Software Debt Cliff Looms
title_cn: 软件债务悬崖逼近，银行家称要“做好战争准备”
summary:
Na Wei, Barclays Capital, Global Head of Leveraged Finance
Susan Kasser, Neuberger Berman, Head of Private Debt
Lotfi Karoui, Pimco Multi-Asset Credit Strategist and Co-Head of Client Solutions and Analytics
Christina Lee, Oaktree, Managing Director and Co-Portfolio Manager
Moderator: Nabila Ahmed

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI and the race to capital dominate at Bloomberg Tech
title_cn: 人工智能和资本竞赛在彭博科技占据主导地位
summary: The biggest stories from Bloomberg Tech in San Francisco came down to a massive race to capital and the future of AI. Ed Ludlow breaks down a blockbuster lineup featuring major newsmaker moments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Would’ve ‘Imploded’ If Altman Didn’t Return, Ex-CTO Says
title_cn: 前首席技术官表示，如果 Altman 没有回归，OpenAI 就会“崩溃”
summary: OpenAI would likely have unraveled if Sam Altman hadn’t returned as chief executive officer following his brief ouster in 2023, former tech chief Mira Murati said, offering her clearest account yet of one of Silicon Valley’s most dramatic boardroom battles.

title: Morgan Stanley Sees AI-Related Funding Expanding to 15% of All Credit Deals
title_cn: 摩根士丹利预计人工智能相关融资将扩大至所有信贷交易的 15%
summary: As the tech industry rushes to develop artificial intelligence, Morgan Stanley's Anish Shah, the bank's global head of debt capital markets, says at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum on June 3 that the spending will fuel a debt issuance boom that could approach 15% of all credit sales. He spoke alongside Wells Fargo's Maureen O'Connor, Invesco's Matt Brill and Robert Cohen of DoubleLine in a panel moderated by Bloomberg News' Nabila Ahmed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LinkedIn Co-Founder Reid Hoffman to Leave Microsoft’s Board
title_cn: LinkedIn 联合创始人 Reid Hoffman 将离开微软董事会
summary: Reid Hoffman, the LinkedIn co-founder and venture capitalist, will leave Microsoft Corp.’s board later this year, saying he wants to focus on his new artificial intelligence company.

title: Nvidia's Profit Margins Are Safe for Now, Luria Says
title_cn: 卢里亚表示，英伟达的利润率目前是安全的
summary: Gil Luria, DA Davidson’s head of technology research, says Nvidia's profit margins are relatively safe through the year 2030 because hyperscalers have few alternatives for the chips they use to power data centers. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Stocks Got 'Over Their Skis,' Strategist Bartels Says
title_cn: 策略师巴特尔斯表示，半导体股已经“失控”
summary: Sanctuary Wealth Chief Investment Strategist Mary Ann Bartels says technology stocks are "extremely overbought" from a technical standpoint and were overdue for a pullback during an interview with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Oversight Should Keep Up With Latest Models, GOP Senator Says
title_cn: 共和党参议员表示，人工智能监督应跟上最新模型
summary: The US government should consider the possibility that artificial intelligence becomes so advanced that it can improve itself without human intervention, and agencies should factor that risk into any voluntary federal testing of cutting-edge models, a key Republican senator said in a letter to the Trump administration.

title: BlackRock's Rieder Talks Jobs Report, AI and Markets
title_cn: 贝莱德的 Rieder 谈论就业报告、人工智能和市场
summary: BlackRock Global Fixed Income CIO Rick Rieder reacts to the May US employment report and discusses the impact of AI and the Iran conflict on financial markets. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Rieder also comments on Bank of Japan and Federal Reserve monetary policies, bond yields and the private credit market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia 70%+ Margins Safe Through 2030, DA Davidson’s Luria Says
title_cn: DA Davidson 的 Luria 表示，到 2030 年，Nvidia 的利润率将保持在 70% 以上
summary: Nvidia Corp.’s profit margins are relatively safe through 2030 because hyperscalers have few alternatives for the chips powering data centers for artificial intelligence, DA Davidson’s head of technology research said.

title: Inside Hudson River Trading’s Blistering Token Burn
title_cn: 哈德逊河交易 (Hudson River Trading) 代币烧毁的内部情况
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Iain Dunning, head of AI at Hudson River Trading, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to talk about how the firm is deploying AI and how much employees are actually spending on tokens. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM, AT&T Accused by Whistleblower of Covering Up Breaches
title_cn: IBM、AT&T 被举报人指控掩盖违规行为
summary: International Business Machines Corp. and AT&T Inc.’s computer systems were repeatedly breached by foreign hackers, and the companies concealed those intrusions from the US government in violation of the law, according to a lawsuit from a former IBM cybersecurity official.

title: AI Contributing to 'Solid' Jobs Report, BlackRock's Rieder Says
title_cn: 贝莱德的里德表示，人工智能为“可靠”的就业报告做出了贡献
summary: BlackRock Global Fixed Income CIO Rick Rieder reacts to the May US employment report. Speaking with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Rieder calls the report "fascinating" in many regards, including a strong construction sector driven by nonresidential projects linked to AI infrastructure buildout. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME’s Duffy Voices ‘Grave Concerns’ With New Perps Contracts
title_cn: CME 的 Duffy 对新的 Perps 合同表示“严重担忧”
summary: Terry Duffy, the chief executive officer of CME Group Inc., said he is “very concerned” about the rise of so-called perpetual futures, an increasingly popular kind of financial contract that recently won key US regulatory approval.

title: EU’s Answer to Musk’s SpaceX Set to Test New Merger Regime
title_cn: 欧盟对马斯克 SpaceX 测试新合并制度的回应
summary: A proposed satellite joint venture between Airbus SE, Leonardo SpA and Thales SA is set to test the EU’s revamped merger framework, which aims to help create globally competitive European champions.

title: Egypt Trade Minister: Beginning To List State-Owned Assets
title_cn: 埃及贸易部长：开始列出国有资产
summary: The Egyptian government has IPO plans for various state-owned assets as it opens up the country to more foreign and private investment, says Mohamed Farid, Egyptian Minister of Investment and Foreign Trade. This includes the listing of major Egyptian bank Banque du Caire. Minister Farid was on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Space Startup Apex Doubles Valuation to $2.3 Billion
title_cn: 太空初创公司 Apex 估值翻倍至 23 亿美元
summary: Space startup Apex announced that it had raised more than $200 million as it works to increase production of satellite platforms for commercial firms and government work, including the development of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome missile defense shield.

title: China Seeks More Startups, Unicorns in Future Industry Push
title_cn: 中国寻求更多初创企业、独角兽公司推动未来产业发展
summary: China said it will foster more startups and unicorn companies in key sectors, in the latest sign of stronger policy support for new industries and firms that will help it achieve technological self-reliance.

title: Entire Market Is One Trade, Says Morgan Stanley’s Lisa Shalett
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的 Lisa Shalett 表示，整个市场就是一笔交易
summary: Lisa Shalett, CIO at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, sees investors mistaking pricing power in semiconductors as productivity and says she views Broadcom as “a warning flag” for markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TeraWulf Eyes Leveraged Loans After Data Center Bond Market Win
title_cn: 数据中心债券市场获胜后，TeraWulf 着眼于杠杆贷款
summary: Fresh off executing a landmark junk bond sale, data center firm TeraWulf Inc. is now exploring ways to access the leveraged loan market for its AI infrastructure build out.

title: Has the AI Trade  Run Too Far?
title_cn: 人工智能行业是否走得太远了？
summary:
Investors know the AI boom will come to an end — the question is, when?

Skylar Montgomery Koning has the key takeaways from Bloomberg MLIV's latest event in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revolut Co-Founder, CTO Vlad Yatsenko to Step Down From Role
title_cn: Revolut 联合创始人兼首席技术官 Vlad Yatsenko 卸任
summary: Revolut Ltd.’s chief technology officer, Vlad Yatsenko, and Chief Executive Officer Nik Storonsky’s early partner, is stepping down from his position at the digital bank in July.

title: Anthropic Calls for AI Pause Button to Let Humans Take Stock
title_cn: 人为呼吁人工智能暂停按钮让人类进行盘点
summary: Anthropic PBC called for the creation of a system in which governments and artificial intelligence developers collectively decide when to slow work on the technology to stave off the risks it may pose.

title: Telenor Is Said to Explore Sale of Digital Bank in Pakistan
title_cn: 据称 Telenor 将探索在巴基斯坦出售数字银行
summary: Telenor ASA is considering selling its controlling stake in its digital bank in Pakistan, people familiar with the matter said, a move that would mark its full exit from the South Asian nation.

title: SpaceX IPO Denied Fast Track Entry by S&P
title_cn: 标准普尔拒绝 SpaceX 首次公开募股进入快速通道
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices will not shorten its existing eligibility requirements for benchmarks including the S&P 500, closing the door to fast entry for big tech IPOs like SpaceX. Mandeep Singh of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta’s Wang Says AI Agents Will Redefine How We Relate to Technology
title_cn: Meta 的 Wang 表示人工智能代理将重新定义我们与技术的关系
summary: The industry needs to build trust for people to make the best use of AI

title: VC Haun on Investing in the Frontiers of AI Agents
title_cn: VC Haun 谈投资人工智能代理领域
summary: Katie Haun, Founder & CEO at Haun Ventures discusses venture strategy, AI agents and emerging technology opportunities with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chatbots Are Trying to Replace the Work of Financial Advisers
title_cn: 聊天机器人正试图取代财务顾问的工作
summary: How much money would you hand to Claude?

title: SEC Vote on Plan to Scrap Trade-Through Ban Set for Next Week
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会将投票决定下周取消交易禁令的计划
summary: A full repeal of the so-called trade-through rule is included in a forthcoming proposal from the Securities and Exchange Commission, a top agency official said.

title: Colombian Frontrunner Vows Swift Unwind of Petro’s Anti-Oil Push
title_cn: 哥伦比亚领跑者誓言迅速放松石油公司的反石油行动
summary: Colombian presidential frontrunner Abelardo de la Espriella plans to start rolling back the government’s anti-oil policies immediately after taking office, signaling that the Andean nation is once again open to new investment in the sector.

title: Three Turkish Banks to Merge in Islamic Economy Push
title_cn: 土耳其三大银行将合并推动伊斯兰经济
summary: Turkey’s three state-run Islamic banks will merge, President Recep Tayyip Erdogan said on Friday, declaring a new initiative to boost the share of so-called participation banking in the financial system.

title: Markets 'Terribly Wrong' to Price in Rate Hike, Kevin Hassett Says
title_cn: 凯文·哈塞特表示，市场对加息的定价“非常错误”
summary: The markets are "terribly wrong" to price in an interest rate hike this year by the Federal Reserve, says National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." US job growth topped all estimates in May. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sánchez revive el legado de Castillo en una reñida segunda vuelta en Perú
title_cn: 桑切斯在秘鲁第二轮比赛中重振卡斯蒂略的传奇
summary: El balotaje entre el izquierdista Roberto Sánchez, heredero político del encarcelado expresidente Pedro Castillo, y Keiko, la hija del autoritario expresidente Alberto Fujimori, es visto como un referendo sobre la riqueza y la pobreza.

title: India, US May Execute Interim Trade Pact by July, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示，印度和美国可能在七月前执行临时贸易协定
summary: India and the US may execute an interim trade deal next month, Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal said, even as Washington proposed fresh tariffs on imports from major trading partners including the South Asian nation.

title: EU Weighs Rule to Force Companies to Diversify Away From China
title_cn: 欧盟考虑制定迫使企业多元化、远离中国的规则
summary: The European Union is advancing a proposal that would force companies to avoid over-dependencies in their supply chains as the bloc looks to reset its trade relationship with China.

title: Turkey, NATO Eye Pipeline Expansion to Bolster Fuel Security
title_cn: 土耳其和北约关注管道扩建以加强燃料安全
summary: Turkey is trying to connect underground fuel pipelines as part of a $28 billion infrastructure expansion by NATO to enhance the alliance’s fuel security, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Switzerland Speeds Anti-Drone Procurement as Incursions Rise
title_cn: 随着入侵事件的增加，瑞士加快反无人机采购
summary: Switzerland’s army chief said the country is fast-tracking the purchase of anti-drone systems as incursions mount over civilian and military infrastructure.

title: Chile Wants US Help to Encourage Venezuelan Migrants to Go Home
title_cn: 智利希望美国帮助鼓励委内瑞拉移民回家
summary: Chile’s government, like the US, is eager to return undocumented Venezuelans to their homeland. Washington needs to help by wielding its influence over the Venezuelan regime, according to a top Chilean lawmaker.

title: US Adds 172,000 Jobs in May Topping All Estimates
title_cn: 美国 5 月份新增就业岗位 172,000 个，超出预期
summary: Hiring in the US surged in May. 172,000 jobs were created topping all forecasts. The estimate was for 88,000. The unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%. Bloomberg's Michael McKee has more on this blowout report on Bloomberg Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mercuria Lawyers Say Government Deals Got Oil Through Hormuz
title_cn: 摩科瑞律师称政府交易通过霍尔木兹获得石油
summary: Mercuria Energy Group Ltd. has moved oil through the Strait of Hormuz through government-brokered deals, according to legal filings that shine a rare light on how commodity traders are navigating the closely watched waterway during the Iran war.

title: Romania Evacuates Black Sea Port After Marine Drone Blast
title_cn: 罗马尼亚在海上无人机爆炸后撤离黑海港口
summary: A marine drone used in the war in Ukraine exploded in the Romanian port of Constanta a week after another drone crashed into a building in another town in the NATO and EU member state.

title: Senate Passes Immigration Bill After Feud Over $1.8 Billion Fund
title_cn: 参议院在 18 亿美元资金纠纷后通过移民法案
summary: President Donald Trump’s long-delayed immigration enforcement funding bill passed the US Senate early Friday, overcoming pushback from Republican dissidents concerned the administration would resurrect a controversial fund to pay political allies who claim to have been unfairly targeted by the federal government.

title: Nestle CEO Joins Warnings Against Swiss Population Cap Idea
title_cn: 雀巢首席执行官加入对瑞士人口上限想法的警告
summary: Nestle SA Chief Executive Officer Philipp Navratil warned Swiss citizens not to take its business-friendly environment for granted ahead of a national vote on a proposal to cap the population at 10 million.

title: South Africa President to Address Nation on Migration Action Plan
title_cn: 南非总统将就移民行动计划向全国发表讲话
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa will address the nation on the country’s approach to managing migration, according to Minister in the Presidency Khumbudzo Ntshavheni.

title: Why the Redistricting Spiral Will Keep Going
title_cn: 为什么重新划分选区的螺旋会继续下去
summary: Even as the dust settles for 2026, both parties are gearing up to do it again in 2028

title: UK Sees Risk of $100 Oil Until 2028 in Worsening Iran Outlook
title_cn: 英国认为伊朗前景恶化导致 2028 年油价将面临 100 美元的风险
summary: The UK government has revised its internal oil price forecasts upwards, assessing that crude could stay around $100 a barrel until 2028 even with a US-Iran peace deal because energy flows from the Gulf are now expected to take longer to recover.

title: Azerbaijan Says Drone Strikes Kill Five Nationals in Sea of Azov
title_cn: 阿塞拜疆称无人机袭击导致亚速海五名国民死亡
summary: Drone strikes killed five Azerbaijani citizens and injured three after hitting two foreign cargo vessels in the Sea of Azov overnight, the Foreign Ministry in Baku said.

title: Political Chaos at Home Adds to Marcos’s China Woes
title_cn: 国内政治混乱加剧了马科斯的中国困境
summary: Beleaguered at home, the Philippine president is navigating an increasingly fraught security environment.

title: Some in Putin’s Elite Signal Unease on Russia’s Future at Forum
title_cn: 普京的一些精英在论坛上表达了对俄罗斯未来的不安
summary: Amid all the relentlessly positive spin over Russia’s future direction at President Vladimir Putin’s flagship economic forum this week, some in the country’s political and business elite showed rare public signs of unease.

title: UK, France and Germany to Meet Zelenskyy on Peace Talks
title_cn: 英国、法国和德国将就和平谈判与泽连斯基会面
summary: The leaders of the UK, France and Germany are planning to gather over the weekend with Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to discuss a path to engage Russia in negotiations to end the war.

title: Slovene PM Takes Down Palestinian Flag in Pivot Back to Israel
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚总理为重返以色列而摘下巴勒斯坦国旗
summary: Less than an hour after Janez Jansa was sworn in as Slovenia’s prime minister for the fourth time, he had the Palestinian flag lowered from the main government building in Ljubljana where it flew for two years.

title: The Key Sticking Points for a US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 美伊和平协议的关键症结
summary: The US and Iran have been locked in a stalemate since agreeing to a ceasefire in April. They’ve been unable to reach a deal to end a monthslong war that has killed thousands of people and sparked a global energy crunch.

title: Jailed Leader’s Protege Attempts Left-Wing Comeback in Peru
title_cn: 被监禁领导人的门生试图左翼在秘鲁东山再起
summary: Lea en español

title: Xi to Visit North Korea Next Week for First Time Since 2019
title_cn: 习近平将于下周访问朝鲜，这是 2019 年以来首次
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping will travel to North Korea next week, marking his inaugural overseas trip of the year after recently hosting Donald Trump and Russia’s Vladimir Putin in Beijing.

title: Serbia's Vucic on China Relationship, EU Accession
title_cn: 塞尔维亚武契奇谈中国关系和入盟
summary: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic discusses China relations and the Balkan nation's accession negotiations with the European Union. He speaks to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook on June 1. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Second Malaysian State Calls Elections, Testing Anwar’s Grip
title_cn: 马来西亚第二个州号召大选，考验安华的掌控力
summary: A second Malaysian state this week dissolved its assembly and called for fresh elections, setting up a key test for Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s governing coalition.

title: US Accuses UK of ‘Two-Tiered Policing,’ Underlining Widening Gap
title_cn: 美国指责英国“双层警务”，凸显差距扩大
summary: The US accused the UK of biased policing, endorsing a prominent hard right criticism of Britain’s law enforcement in an unusual intervention that underscores the growing rift between the two allies.
